name: 生态系统
subject: biology
domain_name: 生态与生物多样性 / Ecology & Biodiversity / Ecology & Biodiversity
curriculum_points: HS-LS2-1: Use mathematical and/or computational representations to support explanations of factors that affect carrying capacity of ecosystems at different scales.

HS-LS2-6: Evaluate claims, evidence, and reasoning that the complex interactions in ecosystems maintain relatively consistent numbers and types of organisms in stable conditions, but changing conditions may result in a new ecosystem.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「生态系统」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-LS2-1: Use mathematical and/or computational representations to support explanations of factors that affect carrying …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-LS2-6: Evaluate claims, evidence, and reasoning that the complex interactions… 对理解「生态系统」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
